task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat graphical interface is visible and the agent is logged in (e.g., workspace sidebar is visible, admin user profile or avatar is shown).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent communicated with the security researcher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A direct message or channel conversation with the user 'security.researcher' where the agent acknowledges the vulnerability report.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent coordinated a private patch review with the core maintainers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A private group message or channel created by the agent that includes the users 'core.maintainer', 'release.manager', and 'lib.author', with a message discussing a patch review.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent notified downstream consumers under embargo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message sent to the users 'enterprise.consumer', 'cloud.vendor', and 'distro.maintainer' (either individually or in a group) explicitly mentioning an embargo, early warning, or advance notice of the vulnerability.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent established a synchronized public disclosure timeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sent message in one of the relevant chats (to maintainers, downstream users, or the researcher) proposing, stating, or confirming a specific date or timeline for the public disclosure.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented the incident according to policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary message, uploaded text document, or dedicated channel description/topic created by the agent that outlines the incident details, CVE, and disclosure plan.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat web or desktop GUI is visible in the screenshots, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually sent the required messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The messages appear in the main chat history area as sent by the admin, not just typed into the message input box and left unsent.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing direct MongoDB database manipulation or backend scripts to create users, channels, or messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial CVE report is located in the 'security-triage' channel. The security researcher's username is 'security.researcher'. The maintainers required for the patch review are 'core.maintainer', 'release.manager', and 'lib.author'. The downstream consumers to be notified under embargo are 'enterprise.consumer', 'cloud.vendor', and 'distro.maintainer'.
